description: Create a 3D model of a circular post array using the step rotating group feature. The array should consist of six 10 mm tall cylindrical posts, each with a 5 mm radius, with the first post centered at (25, 0) in the default sketch plane. Configure the rotation at 60 degrees per step for a total of six posts. Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/circular_post_array.slvs.
